text.title: Owner Handover SOP Kit Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces. Validator script enforces required keys and forbidden patterns.

example.note: Missing required fields; violates schema constraints for `owner-handover-sop-kit`. Validator rejects with explicit violation list.

section.title: Forbidden patterns
section.pattern: credentials list empty when accounts exist
